title: Change app name from Resoult to Resolt

requirements.text: Update the HTML page title from 'Resoult' to 'Resolt' in frontend/index.html

quotes: It is the same change the app name to resolt

acceptanceCriteria: The browser tab displays 'Resolt' as the page title

requirements.text: Update the navigation header branding from 'Resoult' to 'Resolt' in frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx

quotes: It is the same change the app name to resolt

acceptanceCriteria: The header displays 'Resolt' as the application name

requirements.text: Update the footer copyright text from 'LocalMarket' to 'Resolt' in frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx

quotes: It is the same change the app name to resolt

acceptanceCriteria: The footer displays '© 2024 Resolt. All rights reserved.'

constraints: Only change branding text, do not modify any functionality or styling
nonGoals: Changing the color scheme or visual design
Modifying backend logic or data structures
